theme_and_archetype.description: Authority, Clarity, Truth. Objective, rigid, and functional. Represents a highly capable 17-year experienced engineering consultancy.
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Industrial precision, architectural blueprints, crisp technical documentation, engineering logic.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold

rules: Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.
Hierarchy gap must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps between headings and subheadings.
No generic full-screen gradients. Use solid stark colors.
95% of the UI should be monochrome (Base and Text colors). Color exists only to guide action.
Use #FF4F00 (Signal Orange) for primary CTAs like 'Order Now' and high-visibility warnings.
Tinted Grey Rule: Greys have a cool blue tint to match the industrial/technical feel.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for normal text.

marketing.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12
marketing.logic: Asymmetry, Visual Tension. Do not fill 100% of the grid perfectly.

dashboard.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
dashboard.logic: Every pixel utilized. h-full on children. Dense, data correlation.

marketing_pages.structure: Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS. Raw divs for overlapping and asymmetry.
marketing_pages.hero_overlay: bg-slate-900/40 for dark overlays if text is over image, ensuring technical precision.
marketing_pages.cards: Avoid generic rounded cards. Use sharp, brutalist, grid-bordered boxes (border-collapse).

dashboard_pages.structure: Shadcn UI components. Use pure rectangular cards (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
dashboard_pages.density: High density, no extra fluff. Pure function.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight for technical crispness.

rules: No placeholder URLs. Use exact URLs provided.
If text is placed over an image, use text-shadow or a gradient overlay for contrast.

hero_bg.description: Yellow industrial robotic arm in action. Ideal for the hero section background highlighting automation.

service_mechanical_cad.description: CAD design workstation for Mechanical Design & Drafting service.

service_conveyors.description: Industrial conveyor belt system for Material Handling Conveyor Design.

service_pipeline_hydro.description: Industrial pipeline valves for Pneumatic pressure & Hydro Testing service.

service_digital_dashboards.description: Data analytics dashboard for Advanced Excel Dashboards & Reporting service.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hover state must be a lighter hue. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500
motion_and_interactions.entrances: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Minimalist.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA minimums. White text on Orange CTA buttons must have sufficient contrast or use very dark text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive/key elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid="order-now-btn", data-testid="service-card-cad").

Marketing_Home.hero: Bold typography, stark technical grid lines over the robotic arm image. Use the 'Grid Borders' layout for the services showcase.
Marketing_Home.expertise_grid: Use a bento box/Tetris grid. Mix large case studies with small data points (17 Years Experience, Jira Management).
Marketing_Home.cta: Massive 'Request Proposal' / 'Order Now' section with stark #FF4F00 background and #F9FAFB text.

Dashboard_Admin.layout: Left sidebar for navigation. Top metrics (Sales, Top Services) using the 'Control Room' dense grid.
Dashboard_Admin.tables: Data dense tables for Project Management and Customer Management. Use pure Shadcn Table.
Dashboard_Admin.export: Include an 'Export to Excel' action in the top right of data tables.

Customer_Portal.layout: Clean, focused forms for Proposal Requests. Cart-like service selection using Shadcn checkboxes/cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion
Do NOT use HTML inputs for complex forms. Use Shadcn components.
Implement the font imports for Cabinet Grotesk and IBM Plex Sans in the global CSS or index.html.
Follow the exact Grid specifications for marketing vs dashboard.
Apply all provided Image URLs strictly in their corresponding sections.
Apply data-testid to every button and form input.
